ENMA659 Special Topics in Electronic Materials (3 Credits)

Topics of current interest in the design and manufacture of electronic materials.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ENMA660 Thermodynamics in Materials Science (3 Credits) Thermodynamics of engineering solids. Thermal, diffusional and mechanical interactions in macroscopic systems. Systems in thermal contact, systems in thermal and diffusive contact, systems in thermal and mechanical contact.
